metadata.description: Reusable diagnostic and radiographic measurement backbone spanning views, modalities, quantitative parameters, reliability, and imaging-to-treatment relationships.
Foundational principles for radiographic views, special studies, modality selection, and escalation pathways.
Reusable trauma measurement set for alignment, articular relationships, and fracture decision thresholds.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Sports Medicine Radiographic Measurements

metadata.description: Reusable sports measurement set for patellofemoral, hip femoroacetabular, and shoulder metrics.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Adult Reconstruction Radiographic Measurements

metadata.description: Reusable arthroplasty measurement set for alignment, offset, component position, and joint-line restoration.
Reusable spine measurement set for coronal deformity and sagittal alignment parameters.
Reusable pediatric measurement set for hip dysplasia, SCFE screening lines, and growth-plate relationships.
Cross-cutting concepts of observer variability, population norms, pitfalls, and decision-threshold governance.
Core orthogonal and regional radiographic projections used as first-line musculoskeletal imaging.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Additional and Special Radiographic Views

metadata.description: Supplemental projections chosen for specific joints, injury patterns, or occult pathology.
Intraoperative or procedural fluoroscopic projections used to guide reduction and implant placement.
Standing or loaded radiographs that demonstrate functional alignment under physiologic load.
Unloaded radiographs used when standing is unsafe or not required for the clinical question.
Contralateral or serial comparison radiographs used to establish patient-specific normals or interval change.
Radiographs obtained under directed stress to demonstrate dynamic instability or occult diastasis.
Cross-sectional CT for fracture mapping, osseous detail, and multiplanar measurement.
MRI for soft tissue, cartilage, marrow, neural, and occult injury evaluation.
Dynamic ultrasound for soft-tissue, tendon, joint fluid, and guided procedures.
Bone scan, SPECT, or PET pathways for infection, occult lesions, and metabolic activity.
Ordered progression from radiographs to advanced modalities based on clinical question and instability risk.
Age-, sex-, laterality-, and population-context adjustments for normal ranges and thresholds.
Technical and interpretive errors that invalidate radiographic measurements.
How imaging findings and measurement thresholds change management decisions.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Observer Variability in Imaging Measurements

metadata.description: Intra- and inter-observer reliability considerations for quantitative imaging parameters.
Anteroposterior projection providing frontal osseous alignment.
Lateral projection providing sagittal osseous alignment.
Oblique projection used to profile articular surfaces or overlapping structures.
Approximately 15-degree internal rotation ankle view assessing mortise symmetry.
Lateral scapular projection used for shoulder dislocation and acromial relationships.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Axillary Lateral Shoulder View

metadata.description: Axillary projection defining glenohumeral centering and anterior/posterior dislocation.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Pelvic Inlet and Outlet Views

metadata.description: Special pelvic projections assessing AP and vertical pelvic ring displacement.
Obturator and iliac oblique views for acetabular columns and walls.
Axial patellofemoral projection for tracking and trochlear relationships.
Standing hip-to-ankle films for mechanical axis and coronal alignment planning.
Weight-bearing spine films for coronal balance and sagittal contour.
Angle formed by lines from the highest point of the anterior process and posterior tuberosity of the calcaneus through the posterior facet.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 20-40 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: decreased angle suggests calcaneal compression/collapse

metadata.description: Critical angle of Gissane at the intersection of the anterior and posterior facets of the calcaneus.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 120-145 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: abnormal angle supports articular calcaneal injury

metadata.description: Angle between the humeral shaft axis and the capitellar physeal line on AP elbow radiograph.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 64-81 degrees with side-to-side comparison preferred
metadata.decision_threshold_text: asymmetric Baumann angle suggests coronal malalignment after supracondylar injury

metadata.description: Line drawn along the anterior humeral cortex on lateral elbow radiograph relating to the capitellum.
metadata.normal_range_text: intersects middle third of capitellum in most children (age-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: anterior translation relative to capitellum suggests extension-type supracondylar displacement

metadata.description: Line along the radial shaft/neck that should intersect the capitellum on orthogonal elbow views.
metadata.normal_range_text: intersects capitellum on AP and lateral views
metadata.decision_threshold_text: failure to intersect capitellum indicates radiocapitellar dislocation/subluxation

metadata.description: Relative length of the distal ulna compared with the distal radius articular surface.
metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral variance is common; population and technique dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: positive or negative variance alters ulnar-sided load and DRUJ interpretation

metadata.description: Sagittal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 11 degrees volar (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: dorsal angulation beyond accepted thresholds influences instability and fixation goals

metadata.description: Frontal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 22-23 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: loss of inclination contributes to radial deformity assessment

metadata.description: Vertical distance from ulnar articular surface to radial styloid tip on PA wrist radiograph.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 11-12 mm (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: shortening is a key distal radius instability and outcome parameter

metadata.description: Horizontal overlap of tibia and fibula on AP or mortise ankle radiograph at the syndesmosis.
metadata.normal_range_text: technique- and view-specific minimum overlap thresholds
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced overlap raises concern for syndesmotic injury

metadata.description: Distance between medial fibular border and incisural surface of the tibia at a defined level above the plafond.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited upper bounds near 6 mm (view- and method-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: widened clear space supports syndesmotic diastasis evaluation

metadata.description: Distance between medial malleolus and medial talus on mortise radiograph.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly compared with superior clear space; absolute cutoffs are source-version dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: widening suggests deltoid incompetence or mortise instability

metadata.description: Weight-bearing limb axis from hip center through knee to ankle center used for coronal alignment assessment.
metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral mechanical axis with population-specific ranges
metadata.decision_threshold_text: deviation guides osteotomy, arthroplasty, and deformity planning

metadata.description: Family of coronal and sagittal alignment parameters used across trauma and reconstruction.
metadata.normal_range_text: region- and modality-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: alignment thresholds change reduction and construct goals

metadata.description: Ratio of patellar tendon length to patellar length on lateral knee radiograph.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 0.8-1.2 (method-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated ratio suggests patella alta; reduced ratio suggests patella baja

metadata.description: Ratio of articular patellar surface distance to tibial plateau over patellar articular length.
metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 0.6-1.3 (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: used for patellar height assessment independent of patellar morphology

metadata.description: Tibial tubercle to trochlear groove distance measured on axial CT or MRI.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited risk thresholds near 15-20 mm are method- and population-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: increased TT-TG contributes to lateralization risk assessment

metadata.description: Angle between femoral neck axis and the point where femoral head-neck asphericity begins on oblique axial imaging.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited thresholds near 50-55 degrees are source- and plane-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated alpha angle supports cam-type femoroacetabular impingement morphology

metadata.description: Angle between vertical line through femoral head center and line to lateral acetabular sourcil.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly >25 degrees normal; 20-25 borderline; <20 dysplasia (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced LCEA supports undercoverage/dysplasia evaluation

metadata.description: Acetabular inclination angle of the weight-bearing sourcil relative to horizontal.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly <10 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated Tönnis angle supports acetabular dysplasia morphology

metadata.description: Superior distance between acromion and humeral head on AP or outlet shoulder radiograph.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly >7 mm; reduced values raise concern for rotator cuff deficiency (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: narrow AHI suggests superior migration from massive cuff pathology

metadata.description: Angle between glenoid plane and line from inferior glenoid to lateral acromial edge.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited mid-range near 30-35 degrees with higher values linked to cuff risk (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: extreme CSA values associate with cuff tear versus osteoarthritis patterns

metadata.description: Radiographic comparison of limb lengths using pelvic reference lines and lesser trochanters or full-length films.
metadata.normal_range_text: side-to-side difference near zero; clinical tolerance is goal- and patient-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: unplanned LLD after arthroplasty is a key reconstruction quality metric

metadata.description: Perpendicular distance from femoral head center to femoral shaft axis.
metadata.normal_range_text: patient-specific; restoration relative to native or contralateral side
metadata.decision_threshold_text: under- or over-restoration affects abductor tension and stability

metadata.description: Abduction angle of the acetabular component relative to the transverse pelvic axis.
metadata.normal_range_text: commonly discussed safe zones near 30-50 degrees are contested and source-version dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: extreme inclination contributes to instability and wear risk assessment

metadata.description: Forward opening of the acetabular component measured on cross-table lateral, CT, or calculated methods.
metadata.normal_range_text: method-dependent; commonly discussed mid-range values are contested
metadata.decision_threshold_text: version extremes contribute to dislocation and impingement risk

metadata.description: Restoration of the reconstructed femoral head center relative to native or planned hip center.
metadata.normal_range_text: goal is anatomic or planned restoration within reconstruction constraints
metadata.decision_threshold_text: superior/lateralization alters offset, length, and joint reaction force

metadata.description: Coronal arthroplasty alignment strategy targeting neutral mechanical axis relationships.
metadata.normal_range_text: target corridors are construct- and philosophy-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: outliers from planned mechanical targets alter load distribution

metadata.description: Restoration of native or planned joint line height after knee or hip reconstruction.
metadata.normal_range_text: patient-specific native joint line references
metadata.decision_threshold_text: joint-line elevation or depression affects kinematics and extensor mechanism

metadata.description: Family of hip-knee-ankle and component coronal parameters used in reconstruction.
metadata.normal_range_text: philosophy- and patient-specific corridors
metadata.decision_threshold_text: coronal outliers influence polyethylene load and longevity discussions

metadata.description: Angle between endplates of the most tilted proximal and distal vertebrae of a curve.
metadata.normal_range_text: curve magnitude thresholds for observation versus treatment are age- and etiology-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: Cobb magnitude drives scoliosis surveillance and treatment thresholds

metadata.description: Angle between perpendicular to sacral endplate at its midpoint and line to femoral head axis.
metadata.normal_range_text: morphologic constant with wide population range
metadata.decision_threshold_text: PI sets the target framework for PT and SS relationships

metadata.description: Angle between vertical and the line from sacral endplate midpoint to femoral head axis.
metadata.normal_range_text: compensatory ranges are age- and deformity-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated PT indicates pelvic retroversion compensation

metadata.description: Angle between sacral endplate and horizontal reference.
metadata.normal_range_text: related to PI and PT by PI ≈ PT + SS
metadata.decision_threshold_text: abnormal SS contributes to sagittal imbalance analysis

metadata.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the posterosuperior sacral corner.
metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral to small positive offset; thresholds are age-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: increased positive SVA indicates global sagittal malalignment

metadata.description: Family of cervical parameters including lordosis and chin-brow / C2-C7 relationships.
metadata.normal_range_text: age- and method-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: cervical malalignment affects horizontal gaze and myelopathy planning

metadata.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the central sacral vertical line.
metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral coronal balance preferred
metadata.decision_threshold_text: coronal imbalance influences deformity correction goals

metadata.description: Line along the superior femoral neck that should intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis on AP pelvis.
metadata.normal_range_text: intersects epiphysis; comparison with contralateral side recommended
metadata.decision_threshold_text: failure to intersect epiphysis raises concern for SCFE

metadata.description: Percent of femoral head lateral to Perkins line on AP pelvis.
metadata.normal_range_text: age- and condition-specific surveillance thresholds
metadata.decision_threshold_text: progressive migration guides hip surveillance and intervention timing

metadata.description: Angle between Hilgenreiner line and the acetabular roof on pediatric AP pelvis.
metadata.normal_range_text: age-dependent norms with progressive decrease after birth
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated AI supports DDH monitoring and treatment thresholds

metadata.description: Lateral femoral head coverage angle used in older children and adolescents with age-adjusted norms.
metadata.normal_range_text: age-dependent; not interchangeable with adult thresholds without adjustment
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced coverage supports residual dysplasia evaluation

metadata.description: Radiographic relationships of physis, epiphysis, and metaphysis used to detect injury and deformity risk.
metadata.normal_range_text: age- and site-specific ossification and alignment norms
metadata.decision_threshold_text: physeal irregularity or displacement changes pediatric management urgency

metadata.description: Radiographic finding of reduced Böhler angle suggesting calcaneal compression.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Widened Medial Clear Space

metadata.description: Mortise finding of increased medial clear space suggesting deltoid/mortise incompetence.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Widened Tibiofibular Clear Space

metadata.description: Syndesmotic finding of increased tibiofibular clear space.
Ulna projects distal relative to radius articular surface.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Dorsal Angulation of Distal Radius

metadata.description: Loss of normal volar tilt with dorsal articular angulation.
Elevated patellar height by accepted ratio thresholds.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Cam Morphology (Elevated Alpha Angle)

metadata.description: Head-neck asphericity suggested by elevated alpha angle.
Reduced lateral center-edge coverage suggesting dysplasia morphology.
Reduced acromiohumeral interval with superior humeral head position.
Discordance among PI, PT, SS, and lumbar parameters.
Klein line fails to intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis.
Loss of radial length on wrist radiographs affecting alignment goals.
Hip-knee-ankle alignment influencing unicompartmental versus TKA candidacy.
Imaging used to document alignment after reduction and immobilization.
Canonical radiographic, CT, MRI, and ultrasound landmarks.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Upper Extremity Trauma Anatomy Hub

metadata.description: Composite shoulder-to-elbow model linking clavicle, proximal humerus, shaft, distal humerus, and neurovascular structures.
Humeral head, neck, and tuberosity region forming the shoulder articular unit.
Distal metaphyseal and articular humerus forming the proximal elbow.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Lower Extremity Trauma Anatomy Hub

metadata.description: Composite pelvis-to-foot model linking pelvic ring, knee, leg, and hindfoot structures for trauma neighborhoods.
Bony pelvic ring formed by ilium, ischium, pubis, and sacrum.
Lateral pelvic ilium region relevant to acetabular column and pelvic ring injuries.
Hip socket formed by ilium, ischium, and pubis; injured in acetabular fractures.
Distal femoral metaphysis and condylar region forming the proximal knee.
Sesamoid bone within the extensor mechanism at the anterior knee.
Quadriceps-patella-tibial tubercle linkage enabling knee extension.
Hindfoot bone articulating with talus at the subtalar joint.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Proximal Femur Anatomy Hub

metadata.description: Composite proximal femur model linking head, neck, trochanters, calcar, and hip joint.
Articular femoral head supplied largely by retinacular and circumflex vessels.
Intracapsular segment between femoral head and intertrochanteric region.
Ball-and-socket articulation between femoral head and acetabulum.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Hand & Wrist Anatomy Hub

metadata.description: Composite forearm-to-fingertip model linking radius, ulna, carpus, metacarpals, digits, tendons, ligaments, nerves, and vessels for Prepare Hand rotation.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Obtain adequate orthogonal radiographs before escalating to advanced imaging when the clinical question is osseous alignment or fracture pattern.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Weight-bearing radiographs answer functional alignment questions that non-weight-bearing studies can understate.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Stress radiographs are reserved for dynamic instability questions not answered by static views.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Imaging escalation is driven by the unresolved clinical question, not by modality availability alone.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: CT is used for multiplanar osseous mapping and measurement when radiographs incompletely define articular or complex fracture morphology.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: MRI is preferred when soft-tissue, cartilage, marrow, or neural integrity changes management.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Böhler angle is measured on a true lateral hindfoot radiograph and reduced values support calcaneal compression assessment.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Gissane angle complements Böhler angle for posterior facet geometry and should not be used interchangeably.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: On a true lateral pediatric elbow radiograph, the anterior humeral line relationship to the capitellum screens extension-type supracondylar displacement.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: The radiocapitellar line should intersect the capitellum on both AP and lateral views; a normal relationship on one view does not exclude dislocation.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Distal radius radiographic assessment includes volar tilt, radial inclination, radial height, and ulnar variance with technique-matched normals.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Ankle mortise interpretation includes medial clear space, tibiofibular clear space, and tibiofibular overlap using consistent landmarks.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Patellar height ratios are method-specific; Insall-Salvati and Caton-Deschamps are not interchangeable without stating the method.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: TT-TG distance requires standardized axial landmarks and should be interpreted with trochlear morphology and soft-tissue stabilizers.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Alpha angle thresholds are plane- and source-dependent; report the imaging plane with the numeric value.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Lateral center-edge and Tönnis angles describe acetabular coverage and inclination and must use a standardized AP pelvis.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Reduced acromiohumeral interval supports superior humeral migration and massive cuff deficiency assessment, not isolated impingement diagnosis.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: THA radiographic quality metrics include cup inclination, cup anteversion, offset, hip center, and leg-length relationships.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Mechanical alignment targets are planning philosophies; report the reference axis and component corridor used.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Cobb angle requires identifiable end vertebrae on a standing radiograph and remains a draft threshold until specialist review.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Pelvic incidence is a morphologic constant that frames pelvic tilt and sacral slope relationships in sagittal analysis.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Sagittal vertical axis quantifies global sagittal alignment and must be age-contextualized before treatment thresholds are applied.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: A Klein line that misses the epiphysis is concerning for SCFE, but a normal Klein line does not exclude mild slip; use frog-lateral comparison.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Acetabular index norms are age-dependent; adult center-edge thresholds must not be applied to infants without adjustment.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Quantitative thresholds require units, population context, measurement method, and source version before publication.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Projection error, rotation, and nonstandard landmarks are common causes of false-positive measurement abnormalities.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: State how each abnormal measurement changes the immediate plan: observe, protect, reduce, image further, or operate.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

metadata.claim_text: Comparison views establish patient-specific normals for pediatric angles and subtle side-to-side asymmetry.

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Key anatomy is rotated, truncated, or not profiled on the initial radiographs
metadata.action: Repeat orthogonal or indicated special views before definitive measurement or disposition

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Radiographs leave articular surface, column, or multiplanar morphology unresolved and management depends on that detail
metadata.action: Escalate to CT with multiplanar reconstruction and document the unanswered clinical question

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Soft-tissue, cartilage, neural, or occult injury findings would change immobilization, surgery, or clearance
metadata.action: Obtain MRI when safe and available; do not delay limb- or cord-threatening care for elective advanced imaging

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: True lateral hindfoot radiograph shows a decreased Böhler angle after calcaneal injury
metadata.action: Treat as evidence of calcaneal compression; complete hindfoot series/CT as indicated and route numeric threshold confirmation to human review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Mortise radiograph shows widened medial clear space or syndesmotic parameters outside method-specific norms
metadata.action: Protect the ankle, consider stress views or advanced imaging, and escalate for instability management after threshold review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Distal radius parameters show dorsal angulation, height loss, or inclination change beyond accepted draft thresholds
metadata.action: Assess stability criteria, obtain comparison/post-reduction films, and route numeric cutoffs to human review before publication

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Pediatric lateral elbow radiograph shows anterior humeral line not intersecting the expected capitellar third
metadata.action: Treat as potential extension-type displacement, obtain adequate orthogonal views, and route to pediatric specialist review for threshold confirmation

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Klein line fails to intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis or frog-lateral comparison is concerning for SCFE
metadata.action: Make the patient non-weight-bearing, obtain indicated orthogonal/frog-lateral imaging, and escalate urgently with pediatric specialist review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Age-adjusted acetabular index or migration percentage exceeds draft surveillance thresholds
metadata.action: Continue hip surveillance pathway and route all pediatric numeric thresholds to specialist review before treatment decisions are published

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Axial CT/MRI TT-TG exceeds draft method-specific risk thresholds in a patellar instability evaluation
metadata.action: Interpret with trochlear dysplasia and soft-tissue factors; keep numeric cutoff under human review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: AP pelvis shows reduced lateral center-edge angle or elevated Tönnis angle suggesting undercoverage
metadata.action: Correlate with clinical impingement/instability exam and keep coverage thresholds under human review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Postoperative THA radiographs show cup inclination or anteversion outside the planned corridor
metadata.action: Assess dislocation risk factors, obtain dedicated version imaging if needed, and keep safe-zone numbers under attending review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Standing spine radiograph demonstrates a curve magnitude near observation-versus-treatment draft thresholds
metadata.action: Confirm end vertebrae, technique, and age context; route all spine thresholds to specialist review

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Global sagittal parameters show positive sagittal imbalance relevant to reconstructive planning
metadata.action: Complete spinopelvic set (PI, PT, SS, SVA) and require spine specialist review before publishing numeric targets

existingProposals.evidence_summary: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; thresholds and pediatric/spine routes require specialist/human review

metadata.trigger: Measurement appears abnormal but projection, rotation, or landmark selection is nonstandard
metadata.action: Reject the numeric result, repeat standardized imaging, and document why the measurement is invalid
